name: finance-data-mcp
title: Finance Data MCP Server — Real-Time Market, Stock, Crypto, Forex & Macro Data
description: Comprehensive financial data server for AI agents and MCP clients. 10 tools covering stock quotes, financials, analysis, market overview, economic indicators, crypto, forex, SEC filings, earnings calendar, and news sentiment. Covers US (NYSE/NASDAQ) and India (NSE/BSE) markets. Designed for AI agent consumption with structured, clean output. No API keys needed for core features — free data sources with intelligent fallbacks.

tool.title: Tool
tool.description: Which financial data tool to invoke.

tickers.title: Tickers
tickers.description: Stock/crypto/forex ticker symbols. US: NVDA, AAPL. India NSE: RELIANCE.NS, TCS.NS. Crypto: BTC-USD, ETH-USD. Forex: EURUSD=X.

financial_type.title: Financial Statement Type
financial_type.description: Which financial statement to retrieve. stock_financials tool only.

period.title: Period
period.description: Data period. 'annual' or 'quarterly'. For stock_financials and stock_analysis.

indicators.title: Economic Indicators
indicators.description: Which macro indicators. economic_indicators tool only.

filing_type.title: SEC Filing Type
filing_type.description: Type of SEC filing to search. sec_filings tool only.

query.title: Search Query
query.description: Free-text search for news_sentiment and sec_filings tools.

limit.title: Result Limit
limit.description: Maximum results to return per request.

dataset.title: Finance Data Results
dataset.description: Structured financial data returned by the selected tool. Each result includes metadata, source attribution, and timestamp.

ticker.title: Ticker
ticker.description: Primary ticker symbol for this result.

fetched_at.title: Fetched At
fetched_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of data retrieval.

cache_ttl.title: Cache TTL
cache_ttl.description: Suggested cache time-to-live in seconds for this data type.
